note: Use as ground elevation / lower no-fly boundary.
Useful for terrain complexity, not a direct air obstacle.
Useful for terrain roughness, not a direct air obstacle.
Use as 3D blocked volume. Check heights because many OSM buildings may use default height.
Use for road-crossing risk, access, or traffic exposure. Do not block airspace by default.
Useful for checking OSM geometry vertices. Prefer sampled road points for gridded risk.
Good for rasterizing road-proximity or road-crossing risk.

height_source: assumed z_min/z_max unless OSM/custom height added
note: Use as conservative 3D blocked corridor. Need field/DSM check for true cable height and sag.

height_source: OSM height if available, otherwise tower/pole default
note: Use as point/cylinder obstacle. Check whether tower/pole classification is complete.
Use near DB/DK/FLZ or flight below about 20 m AGL. Usually not important for normal cruise altitude.
Use near takeoff/landing corridors. OSM completeness can be poor.
